Champions League

A 1v1 knockout tournament. Everyone plays everyone, then the top 4 fight through the playoffs to be crowned champion.

Games per player

With a limit, who you face is decided live — whoever's free first gets matched first, not a fixed schedule. You'll stop once you hit your own limit; some players may end up with one fewer or more game than others.

Decks, losing limit and games-per-player are set in the room. Needs at least 4 players — odd counts are fine, whoever's unpaired that round just sits out.
